chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-1235 of 2020 Muhammad Asghar Babbar Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection No.18 2. For orders on Misc. No.10223/20 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 21.04.2025 None present. -.-.- This is an old case of 2020, which is over five years ago. It was lastly taken up on 02.04.2024. Since then no urgent application has been moved by the petitioner for hearing of the case. Today petitioner who is appearing in person is called absent without any intimation, which shows that he has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is hereby dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Head of Const. Benches Judge
